user.description: Set required parameters to connect to your router

data_description.username: This is always 'root' by default on GL-iNet devices
data_description.host: The hostname or IP address of your GL-iNet router.
data_description.password: The password you use to login to your router's admin page, this is unlikely to be the same as your WiFi password
data_description.consider_home: Seconds to wait before deciding that a device is away

reauth_confirm.description: The password for {host} is no longer valid. Enter the current password to re-authenticate.

data_description.password: The password you use to login to your router's admin page, this is unlikely to be the same as your WiFi password

reconfigure.description: Update the connection settings for your GL-iNet router

data_description.username: This is always 'root' by default on GL-iNet devices
data_description.host: The hostname or IP address of your GL-iNet router.
data_description.password: The password you use to login to your router's admin page, this is unlikely to be the same as your WiFi password

abort.unique_id_mismatch: This router's MAC address does not match the previously configured router

data_description.consider_home: Seconds to wait before deciding that a device is away
